summary: Phase 6 P&L Equity Curve Chart - All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 tests (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. New P&L Chart feature verified on Overview page.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/analytics/pnl-history returns correct structure (points, current_pnl, peak_pnl, trough_pnl, max_drawdown, total_trades)
GET /api/analytics/pnl-history returns empty points array and zero metrics when no trades exist
Point structure validation (timestamp, cumulative_pnl, trade_pnl, strategy fields)
frontend_ui_tests: Overview page at / loads with data-testid='overview-page'
P&L Chart section present with data-testid='section-pnl-chart'
P&L Chart shows empty state message 'No trades yet — start the engine to see your equity curve'
All 7 nav items present in sidebar (Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings)
Navigation to /arbitrage works - page renders with data-testid='arbitrage-page'
Navigation to /sniper works - page renders with data-testid='sniper-page'
Navigation to /positions works - page renders with data-testid='positions-page'
Navigation to /risk works - page renders with data-testid='risk-page'
Navigation to /markets works - page renders with data-testid='markets-page'
Navigation to /settings works - page renders with data-testid='settings-page'
Return to Overview shows P&L Chart visible

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing engine state with no trades (empty state)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 P&L Equity Curve Chart complete. PnlChart component at /app/frontend/src/components/PnlChart.jsx renders in two states: (1) Empty state when no trades - shows 'P&L Curve' header and centered message 'No trades yet — start the engine to see your equity curve', (2) With trades - shows header with Peak (green), Trough (red), DD (amber), current P&L metrics, and recharts AreaChart with gradient fill. API endpoint GET /api/analytics/pnl-history returns points array with cumulative P&L data. Overview page fetches pnlHistory on mount and every 10s. To see the chart with data, start the engine which will generate paper trades.
notes: Peak/Trough/DD metrics in P&L Chart header are only displayed when there are trades (points.length > 0). In empty state, only the title 'P&L Curve' and empty state message are shown. This is the expected behavior per the component design.
